rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Avoid implementation-only paths in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names (integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
